mapper.select: SELECT id, case_type, question_text, expected_points, expected_format, standard_answer, status FROM ai_skill_test_case WHERE skill_version_id=#{skillVersionId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM ai_skill_test_case WHERE skill_version_id=#{skillVersionId} AND status=1 ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_skill_test_case (skill_id, skill_version_id, case_type, question_text, expected_points, expected_format, standard_answer, status, create_time) VALUES (#{skillId}, #{skillVersionId}, #{caseType}, #{questionText}, #{expectedPoints}, #{expectedFormat}, #{standardAnswer}, #{status}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_skill_test_case SET case_type=#{caseType}, question_text=#{questionText}, expected_points=#{expectedPoints}, expected_format=#{expectedFormat}, standard_answer=#{standardAnswer}, status=#{status} WHERE id=#{id}
